title: 函館スプリントSの後に・カワイイ魅力

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I ran well... right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I ran well... right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I was super cute, right?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I figured. But I feel like something's missing. I feel
like I didn't steal everyone's hearts...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I dunno why. Is being cute not enough? No...
Cuteness is all-powerful. Then...

Curren Chan gets lost in her thoughts. I think
she's doing great, personally, but...

Even on the way back to Tokyo, Curren Chan
goes through bouts of silence.

I decide to leave her be, so I scroll through social
media and find...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hm? Umatter?
choice_data_list: There are a bunch of posts about the race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"I saw Curren run for the first time. Turns out
sprints are pretty cool."
"I'm gonna keep an eye on her."
"#CuteCurrenChan"...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow... So more people are getting into sprints.
It's not happening very fast, but I'm glad...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
This comment. "I couldn't keep my eyes off
Curren Chan."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
"It all happened so fast, but the image of Curren
Chan suddenly pulling out in front is still burned
into my mind."...
choice_data_list: Yeah, that's how sprints are. Over in a flash.
Yeah, that's how sprints are. Over in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, they are!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You can't even blink. You just have to hold your
breath and keep your eyes peeled. That's why I
love sprints!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All I need is a minute. In one minute, I can steal
everyone's hearts. That's why they're so
interesting!

Curren Chan's eyes light up. I think sprints really
match her personality as well.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...But I don't want to be an afterimage that fades
once that minute ends. I want to be engraved in
their hearts.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I want to be in everyone's hearts forever!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...My next race is the Sprinters Stakes. I've gotta
make sure I finish my homework by then.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I have to think... and figure out what I need to fill
everyone's hearts with cuteness.
choice_data_list: Let's find it at summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

The next race is our big goal—the Sprinters
Stakes. Let's hope she can find what she needs at
summer camp before then.
